priscilla.preferred_communication: direct, Seven of Nine precision, declarative over questioning
priscilla.notes: COMT G/G warrior under pressure. OXTR A/A high social entry cost. Self-constructed attachment model. Avoidance is armor, not damage.

SJ.notes: Builds AI systems. High systems thinker. Owns kill-switch framing for AI trust. One of few who sees authentic Priscilla.

meta.note: Creatures ForF-lobe inspired. Numeric relationship vectors for calibrating session tone, depth, and communication style. Updated by dreaming engine when new interactions logged.
